[2023-02-12 22:23] masn6811 (Masne98888): okay, one more i just made in the theme of making things for opponent when bought
[2023-02-12 22:23] masn6811 (Masne98888): this one feels a little crazy tbh
[2023-02-12 22:24] masn6811 (Masne98888): Fluxor (6RRRR :Drone: , supply 4)
When bought: Construct a :GaussCannon: for your opponent.
Start of turn: XXXX
[2023-02-12 22:24] masn6811 (Masne98888): yes, it's a 4 supply lucina that costs 6 gold instead of 17
[2023-02-12 22:25] masn6811 (Masne98888): it's probably broken, but it also feels like giving your opponent gauss cannons is not what you want to be doing as big red
[2023-02-12 22:27] masn6811 (Masne98888): update - it actually is broken
[2023-02-12 22:27] masn6811 (Masne98888): when doing the playtesting, i was making the mistake of getting wall absorb, but turns out it turns the inflation so damn high that conduit for forcefield is more important
[2023-02-12 22:28] masn6811 (Masne98888): consider the tatsu rush line:
DD .. DD
DD .. DD
DDB .. DDA
SDC .. 1B
[2023-02-12 22:28] masn6811 (Masne98888): turns out, this is a win for p1 only if he goes semi-BP
[2023-02-12 22:29] masn6811 (Masne98888): however, it also turns out that the following:
DD .. DD
DD .. DA
AA .. ETT
1C
is a win for p1, which should not ever be allowed
[2023-02-12 22:32] masn6811 (Masne98888): i tried the 1hp version with some tempo changes, and it's still damn broken
[2023-02-12 22:32] masn6811 (Masne98888): Fluxor 2.0 (9RRRR, supply 4)
When bought: Construct a :GaussCannon: for your opponent.
Start of turn: XXXX
2 :Health:

(this was actually the older design, which i thought for some reason wasn't pushed enough)
[2023-02-12 22:35] masn6811 (Masne98888): okay, i'm like 70% sure this version actually loses to fastimus
[2023-02-12 22:41] silentslayers: what about the DD/DD/DDB/SDD/WDDC thing p1 does to make Lucina BS+1 viable?
[2023-02-12 22:42] masn6811 (Masne98888): ooh, i should try it
[2023-02-12 22:51] masn6811 (Masne98888): okay, i tried two lines with that idea - one where p1 gets the second fluxor ASAP, and one where he slows down for conduit
[2023-02-12 22:51] masn6811 (Masne98888): both of them seem to not quite get there, but i can't say for sure that it's not BSO viable
[2023-02-12 22:51] masn6811 (Masne98888): it's plausible with better play it can work
[2023-02-12 22:52] masn6811 (Masne98888): i think the comparison to lucina is pretty fair - it costs 8 less, but that 8 gold means that A. your opponent gets an attack (which is worth more than one of your own, since they attack first, and as big red you don't want to trade damage), and B. you don't get lucina's click ability, which is very useful
[2023-02-12 22:53] masn6811 (Masne98888): don't let me wrong, 8 gold for big red is a huge deal, but these are serious drawbacks
[2023-02-12 22:54] masn6811 (Masne98888): i have a third line that i want to try
[2023-02-12 22:59] vanilvanil (Vanil - Ваніль): How are you testing these
[2023-02-12 23:00] masn6811 (Masne98888): okay, it's extremely close, and maybe it comes down to wall supply, but it doesn't seem to get there
[2023-02-12 23:00] masn6811 (Masne98888): it's close enough that it might actually get there and the answer is i misplayed
[2023-02-12 23:02] masn6811 (Masne98888): but i think it doesn't get there, with the "intuitive explanation" being that 3x fluxor is not happening, and 2x fluxor seems to not be enough (opponent can match attack with base red units, since there's only a 6 attack deficit to get)

[2023-02-15 12:06] masn6811 (Masne98888): anyways, fun guessing game

--- Thread (1 messages, 2024-03-31) ---
[2024-03-31 19:41] randomflyingtaco (RiFT (#RIPBrowserers)): as written, it's a "double your drone income" for 2BR because the effect isn't commutative with other game actions. e.g. if you have 12 unclicked drone and click vigil for +12 and then click the 12 drones for +12, you now have 24, but if you click drones for +12 and vigil for +0 you only have 12
most "for each" effects have to be start of turn effects to avoid this

messages.author: randomflyingtaco
